name: Incanter
description: A generalist caster whose power comes almost entirely from choice of spheres. Gains a bonus feat at 1st and every 2 levels, which can buy extra talents, drawbacks, or casting-related feats, plus a specialization that trades some of that flexibility for a themed package of extra abilities.

name: Elementalist
description: A caster focused on elemental destruction, gaining the Destruction sphere for free at 1st level with full caster-level progression in it regardless of being a Mid-Caster elsewhere, plus evasion and bonus combat feats.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power - verified against spheresofpower.wikidot.com/elementalist

name: Eliciter
description: A social, Mind-sphere-leaning caster who blends magical influence with charisma-driven class features. Gains the Mind sphere for free at 1st level, using class level as caster level for it.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power - verified against spheresofpower.wikidot.com/eliciter

name: Fey Adept
description: A caster bound to a fey patron, drawing on Illusion, Fallen Fey, and Nature-flavored talents.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (stats not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Hedgewitch
description: A hearth-magic generalist who trades raw power for wide-ranging utility and community-focused talents.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (stats not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Mageknight
description: A martial spellcaster who fights in melee while weaving in sphere magic, similar in spirit to a magus.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (stats not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Shifter
description: A caster built around the Alteration sphere, gained for free at 1st level with class level as caster level for it, fighting and adventuring in altered forms.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power - verified against spheresofpower.wikidot.com/shifter

name: Soul Weaver
description: A caster who binds spirits and souls to fuel their magic, with class features built around a bound nexus of spirits.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (caster type confirmed by the wiki; other stats not yet cross-checked)

name: Symbiat
description: A caster fused with a symbiotic bonded creature, sharing power and abilities with it.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (caster type confirmed by the wiki; other stats not yet cross-checked)

name: Thaumaturge
description: A studious caster who channels magic through crafted implements and careful research rather than raw talent.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (stats not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Wraith
description: A stealthy caster drawing on Dark and Death sphere talents to strike from the shadows.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (stats not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Armorist
description: A martial caster who conjures and enhances armor and weapons out of magical force, fighting on the front line.
source: Ultimate Spheres of Power (caster type confirmed by the wiki; other stats not yet cross-checked)
